Of Hearing To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Apr-07-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER ILENA DICK'S Notice of Hearing to Compel Arbitration. John H. O'Reilly, Esq., Attorney at law, (415) 392-2860, appearing for Petitioner and moving party; Michael Degtyarev, Respondent in Pro Per and opposing party.
